visuals.title: DFA for the Regular Expression 'a(b|c)*d'
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Regular Expressions and Finite-State Automata</text>

  <!-- Regular Expression Box -->
  <rect x="50" y="60" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Regex Pattern
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Finite-State Automata Box -->
  <rect x="250" y="60" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    FSA
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Connecting Arrow -->
  <path d="M170 80 L250 80" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>

  <!-- Regex Example -->
  <rect x="30" y="130" width="160" height="60" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="150" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#0D47A1" opacity="0">
    Example Regex:
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="110" y="170" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="10" fill="#0D47A1" opacity="0">
    a(b|c)*d
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- FSA Visualization -->
  <!-- Start State -->
  <circle cx="250" cy="160" r="20" fill="#E3F2FD" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="250" y="164" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    S
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Intermediate States -->
  <circle cx="300" cy="160" r="20" fill="#E3F2FD" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="300" y="164" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    A
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <circle cx="350" cy="160" r="20" fill="#E3F2FD" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="350" y="164" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    B
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Accept State -->
  <circle cx="390" cy="160" r="20" fill="#E3F2FD" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <circle cx="390" cy="160" r="23" fill="none" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="390" y="164" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    F
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Transitions -->
  <path d="M270 160 L280 160" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <text x="275" y="150" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    a
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <path d="M320 160 L330 160" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="4.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <text x="325" y="150" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    b,c
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <path d="M370 160 L380 160" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="4.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <text x="375" y="150" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    d
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Loopback transition -->
  <path d="M350 180 Q340 200 330 180" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="5.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <text x="330" y="200" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    b,c
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="5.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Equivalence Label -->
  <text x="210" y="250" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-style="italic" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Regular Expressions and Finite-State Automata are equivalent
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="5.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="270" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-style="italic" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    in expressive power
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
